title: Alstom R160 for MTR 4.0
description: A Resource pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod that allows you to set rolling stock of R160 Subway cars as seen on the New York City Subway.
body:
A Resource pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway Mod that allows you to set rolling stock of R160 Subway cars as seen on the New York City Subway.

Minecraft Transit Railway Mod 4.0 is required for this to work, you can download it here: https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway

Note: Audio & some textures were sourced from OpenBVE.
